step_rationale: Eicosanoid biomarker in AMI; reflects lipid signaling in acute myocardial injury.
mechanism: 5,6-EET is a cytochrome P450-derived eicosanoid associated with lipid-mediated pathophysiology in acute myocardial events.

references.title: Integrated oral microbiome and metabolome analysis unveils key biomarkers and functional pathway alterations in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology
